market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Spacious 3‑Bed Home – Low Price, Great Value
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to this bright, entire‑home 3‑bedroom bungalow, perfectly suited for families or groups of up to four guests. Nestled in a quiet neighbourhood, the property offers three comfortable bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a clean, modern bathroom. At just £99.8 per night, you’re paying 43% less than the city’s median nightly rate of £175, delivering excellent value without compromising comfort. Guests have rated the stay 4.67 out of 5 based on 15 reviews, praising the space and location. Although the listing isn’t yet a Superhost, the host Zainab is eager to provide a welcoming experience. Over the next 90 days, only 18.5% of nights are booked, leaving many opportunities for travelers looking for an affordable, well‑appointed home. Whether you’re visiting for work, exploring the city’s attractions, or simply relaxing, the bungalow’s flexible layout and quiet setting make it a great base. Book now to enjoy a spacious, budget‑friendly stay in a charming bungalow that feels like home away from home.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space (e.g., private garden or patio)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑quality exterior/front‑of‑bungalow shot as the cover photo to showcase curb appeal and set expectations, followed by interior rooms in a logical flow.
key_diagnosis: Title does not highlight the 43% price advantage; updating it can attract price‑sensitive travelers (current title scores 3/10).
No high‑value amenities are listed; adding outdoor space, parking, or entertainment can boost appeal (currently 0 of 3 top‑value amenities).
Photo count is unknown and likely low; uploading at least 8 clear photos covering every room and the exterior will improve click‑through rates.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate of £99.8 is 43% below the city median of £175, yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at only 18.5%—there’s a clear opportunity to fill more nights at a great price.
